title: Status doesnt change when chronogram end date arrives
excerpt: I used automation to try changing status whenever chronogram end date arrives, but it doesnt seem to work!

posts.author: HusseinHamade (Hussein Hamade)
posts.cookedHtml: I used automation to try changing status whenever chronogram end date arrives, but it doesnt seem to work!

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Hussein,

Have you tried setting a test over, say, 24 hours and using a trigger that goes off once a specific date has been reached? That way, you can make sure everything is working smoothly when that moment comes around.

If you’re still having issues, maybe double-check if there are any other conditions or rules in your automation setup that might be preventing it from running as expected.
Sometimes those little details can trip things up!

Cheers,
Harsh

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com

posts.author: HusseinHamade (Hussein Hamade)
posts.cookedHtml: thanks Fabio. My problem is solved, it just seems that Monday doesnt act retroactively.
